note: As-built set for roadmap 1-4. flow = the shipped /gogo:view grouped menu (plans + reports) + /gogo:done status board data flow (the intended design held as built); sequence = the as-built Stage B /gogo:done work board — classify work, open the terminal-TUI kanban (board.py in tmux) or the table + AskUserQuestion fallback, then ship each pick via the single archive+link flow. The plan-time as-is baseline is copied into report/before/ for the before/after comparison.
